title: The SEC's latest crypto guidance still leaves too much unsaid

title: Midas raises $50M to build instant liquidity layer for tokenized yield
message_html: Midas raises $50M to build instant liquidity layer for tokenized yield ...
snippet: Tokenization startup Midas's Series A round was led by RRE and Creandum to scale an “instant liquidity layer” for onchain yield products.

title: Anchorage Digital, Chainlink back new crypto PAC as election season heats up
message_html: Anchorage Digital, Chainlink back new crypto PAC as election season heats up ...
snippet: A new political action committee, the Blockchain Leadership Fund, launched with backing from Anchorage Digital and Chainlink Labs.
